org.arakhne.tinyMAS.network

Class MTSBasedYellowPages

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.arakhne.tinyMAS.core.YellowPages
      • org.arakhne.tinyMAS.network.MTSBasedYellowPages
  • Deprecated. 
    See "http://www.janus-project.org"

    @Deprecated
public class MTSBasedYellowPages
extends YellowPages
    This yellow page system uses the Message Transport Service to synchronise the service's list along a set of kernel.
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND <galland@arakhne.org>, Nicolas GAUD <nicolas.gaud@utbm.fr>

      • registerService

        public void registerService(String service,
                   AgentIdentifier agent)
        Deprecated. 
        Register a service provided by the specified agent.
        Overrides:
        registerService in class YellowPages
        Parameters:
        service - is the name of the service.
        agent - is the agent that provides the service

      • unregisterService

        public void unregisterService(String service,
                     AgentIdentifier agent)
        Deprecated. 
        Remove the specified agent-service association.
        Overrides:
        unregisterService in class YellowPages
        Parameters:
        service - is the name of the service.
        agent - is the agent that no more provides the service

      • unregisterService

        public void unregisterService(String service)
        Deprecated. 
        Remove a service from the system.

        All associated agents will be unlinked to the specified service.

        Overrides:
        unregisterService in class YellowPages

        Remove the specified agent from the yellow pages.
